particulars.description: By way of first fixed charge:-. (I) all freehold and leasehold land and buildings of the company both present and future and all fixed plant and machinery from time to time in present and future and all fixed plant and machinery from time to time in or on any such land and buildings;. (Ii) all intellectual property now owned or at any time hereafter to be owned by the company.

Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
